inputs.label: Initial Investment (negative for outflow)
inputs.businessContext: The initial cash flow at time 0, typically negative for investment

inputs.label: Year 1 Cash Flow
inputs.businessContext: Net cash flow at end of year 1

inputs.label: Year 2 Cash Flow
inputs.businessContext: Net cash flow at end of year 2

inputs.label: Year 3 Cash Flow
inputs.businessContext: Net cash flow at end of year 3

inputs.label: Year 4 Cash Flow
inputs.businessContext: Net cash flow at end of year 4

inputs.label: Year 5 Cash Flow
inputs.businessContext: Net cash flow at end of year 5

inputs.label: Initial Guess (%)
inputs.businessContext: Starting estimate for iterative IRR calculation

formulas.irr: (function(){var c=[initialInvestment,year1,year2,year3,year4,year5];var r=guess/100;var tol=1e-7;var max=1000;for(var i=0;i<max;i++){var npv=0;for(var t=0;t<c.length;t++){npv+=c[t]/Math.pow(1+r,t);}if(Math.abs(npv)<tol)break;var d=0;for(var t=1;t<c.length;t++){d+=-t*c[t]/Math.pow(1+r,t+1);}r-=npv/d;}return r*100;})()
formulas.npvAtIrr: (function(){var c=[initialInvestment,year1,year2,year3,year4,year5];var r=guess/100;var tol=1e-7;var max=1000;for(var i=0;i<max;i++){var npv=0;for(var t=0;t<c.length;t++){npv+=c[t]/Math.pow(1+r,t);}if(Math.abs(npv)<tol)break;var d=0;for(var t=1;t<c.length;t++){d+=-t*c[t]/Math.pow(1+r,t+1);}r-=npv/d;}var npvFinal=0;for(var t=0;t<c.length;t++){npvFinal+=c[t]/Math.pow(1+r,t);}return npvFinal;})()
